module_sme_rollup.name: Core Accounting & Records
module_sme_rollup.description: Foundational ledger, invoicing, and transaction recording with audit controls

statements.text: Configure chart of accounts with account types, dimensions, and post balanced journal entries with supporting documentation.
Create and manage customer invoices with tax, discounts, and auto-generation from sales orders; process payments flexibly.
Capture vendor bills via manual entry or OCR; perform three-way matching and route through approval workflows.
Record all transactions with immutable audit trail; enforce segregation of duties and multi-level approvals by amount.
Lock periods and year-end close with retained earnings rollover; reconcile sub-ledgers to general ledger.

module_sme_rollup.name: Cash & Liquidity Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Bank reconciliation, payments, and cash flow visibility

statements.text: Import bank statements in multiple formats; automatically match transactions and reconcile cash accounts.
Schedule and execute payment runs with batch files; calculate early-payment discounts and track withholding tax.
Accept customer payments via credit card, PayNow, FAST, GIRO, and digital wallets with automatic reconciliation.
Generate 13-week and 12-month rolling cash forecasts from receivables, payables, and payroll schedules.
Monitor credit limits, DSO, and aging; execute automated dunning and track payment promises.

module_sme_rollup.name: Tax & Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Tax calculation, reporting, and regulatory filing

statements.text: Configure tax codes and automatically calculate tax on sales and purchases; track input and output tax separately.
Generate periodic tax returns in country-specific format; support reverse-charge and partial exemption rules.
Map general ledger accounts to ACRA XBRL taxonomy; validate and submit filings with audit firm sign-off.
Generate and validate invoices in PEPPOL BIS format; submit via certified access point with delivery tracking.
Encrypt financial data at rest and in transit; maintain audit trail of all data access and PDPA consent records.
Generate profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance, and cash flow statements with period comparisons.
Drill down from financial statement lines to underlying transactions; generate aging reports for receivables and payables.
Create and maintain annual budgets by account, department, and cost centre; display actual versus budget variance.
Display pre-built dashboards for CFO, controller, and AR/AP roles with KPIs, drill-down, and mobile access.
Extract invoice data from documents automatically; detect anomalies in journal entries and reconcile bank statements.

module_sme_rollup.name: Multi-Entity & Specialized Accounting
module_sme_rollup.description: Foreign exchange, projects, assets, and consolidation

statements.text: Record transactions in any currency; automatically convert to functional currency and revalue at period end.
Maintain fixed-asset register; calculate depreciation using multiple methods and post automatically at period end.
Capture timesheet and expense entries; track project budgets and calculate work-in-progress and profitability.
Maintain lease register; capitalize right-of-use assets and liabilities; calculate monthly amortization and interest.
Define multi-entity structure; automatically eliminate inter-company transactions and translate foreign subsidiaries.

module_sme_rollup.name: Integration & Operations
module_sme_rollup.description: System connectivity, data management, and user access

statements.text: Import master data and opening balances from Excel; export reports to CSV, Excel, and PDF formats.
Integrate with payroll, CRM, inventory, and bank feed systems; provide REST API for custom integrations.
Create individual user accounts with role-based permissions; detect segregation-of-duties conflicts automatically.
Require two-factor authentication for all logins; support single sign-on and approval delegation.
Provide scheduled automated backups and full data export; generate audit-ready data package for external auditors.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your finance system is accessible, secure, and connected to the rest of your business. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA data protection rules and need staff to access financial data safely from anywhere—especially in hybrid work environments. It matters when your accountant needs to approve an invoice from a client site, or when you're integrating bank feeds to reconcile cash daily.

Core Ledger & Close.narrative: This is the financial backbone—it records every transaction in double-entry format, generates your statutory accounts, and tracks fixed assets and depreciation. Every Singapore SME must produce audited or reviewed financial statements for tax and stakeholder reporting, and you need an immutable audit trail to satisfy ACRA and your auditors. It matters when you're closing the books monthly or preparing for year-end audit.

Revenue Cycle.narrative: This family handles customer invoicing, payment collection, and credit management—the lifeblood of cash flow. Singapore SMEs need to issue invoices quickly, track who owes money, and integrate with local payment schemes (PayNow, GIRO) to get paid faster. It matters when you're chasing overdue invoices or accepting online payments from customers.

Expense Cycle.narrative: This family captures supplier bills, employee expenses, and purchase orders, then routes them for approval and payment. SMEs need to control spending, match invoices to orders, and integrate payroll costs into the ledger. It matters when staff submit expense claims or you're managing supplier payments and want visibility into what you're spending.

Treasury & Compliance.narrative: This family manages cash, tax, multi-currency transactions, and regulatory filings—critical for SME survival and compliance. Singapore SMEs must file GST returns, reconcile bank accounts, and file XBRL statements with ACRA; many also operate in multiple currencies. It matters when you're forecasting cash to meet payroll, calculating GST liability, or preparing your annual statutory filing.

Planning & Analytics.narrative: This family lets you build budgets, compare actual performance, and spot trends through dashboards and AI-powered insights. SMEs use budgets to plan growth and control costs, and dashboards help you spot cash or profitability problems early. It matters when you're planning next year's headcount or want to know which customer or project is most profitable.
